apiErrors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again.
apiErrors.UNAUTHORIZED: Unauthorized. Sign in again as an administrator.
apiErrors.ADDON_INVALID: One or more add-ons are missing or unavailable.
apiErrors.SLOT_TAKEN: This time slot is already taken.
apiErrors.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
apiErrors.BOOKING_NOT_PAYABLE: This booking is not ready for payment.
apiErrors.STRIPE_NO_URL: Could not create the payment session.
apiErrors.STRIPE_SESSION_NOT_FOUND: Could not retrieve the Stripe session.
apiErrors.SESSION_BOOKING_MISMATCH: This session does not match this booking.
apiErrors.REFUND_STRIPE_FAILED: Could not process the refund in Stripe.
apiErrors.INVALID_STATUS: Invalid status. Use CONFIRMED or CANCELLED.
apiErrors.PRICE_INVALID: Price must be a number greater than 0.
apiErrors.DURATION_INVALID: Duration must be an integer of at least 1 (minutes).
apiErrors.IMAGE_FORMAT: Format not allowed. Use JPEG/JPG, PNG, WEBP or GIF.
apiErrors.IMAGE_SIZE: File must be between 1 byte and 5MB.
apiErrors.SERVICE_DELETE_BOOKINGS: Cannot delete: this service has linked bookings.
apiErrors.CONFIRM_PENDING_ONLY: Only a PENDING booking can be confirmed.
apiErrors.VARIANT_REQUIRED: Please choose a duration/price option for the service.
apiErrors.VARIANT_INVALID: That service option is not available.
apiErrors.VARIANT_DELETE_BOOKINGS: Cannot delete: there are bookings using this option.
apiErrors.VARIANT_LAST: At least one duration/price option must remain.
apiErrors.PRICE_MISMATCH: The total does not match the current price. Refresh the page and try again.
apiErrors.TESTIMONIAL_SOURCE_INVALID: Choose a valid source: Google, Instagram, or Facebook.

footer.blurb: A lavender-toned wellness ritual: massages, facials, and an experience designed to help you disconnect and come back to yourself.
footer.copyright: © {year} Body Max Spa. All rights reserved.

hero.imageAlt: Relaxing spa setting with towels and candles
hero.title: Body Max Spa
hero.subtitle: A lavender-toned retreat to reconnect with yourself. Book your massage or facial with quick confirmation.

home.highlight1Desc: Floral scents, 432 Hz music, and warm light to disconnect.
home.highlight2Desc: Botanical extracts and gentle actives for your skin.
home.servicesSubtitle: Choose your experience. We take care of every detail.
home.testimonialsHint: Real feedback from Google, Instagram, or Facebook.
home.quote1: I loved the lavender vibe; I left feeling renewed.
home.quote2: The deep tissue massage saved my week.
home.quote3: Booking was super easy and they are very punctual.
home.ctaSubtitle: Schedule your moment of calm. We are waiting with a tailored experience.

footerContact.dialogDesc: We try to open your mail app. If nothing happens (common on Linux without a client), use Copy draft.
footerContact.subject: Subject
footerContact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help…
footerContact.copied: Draft copied — paste it in Gmail or your web mail.
footerContact.copyPrompt: Copy this text and paste it into your email:

whatsAppFloat.defaultMessage: Hello, I would like information about Body Max Spa and availability for an appointment.
whatsAppFloat.title: WhatsApp
whatsAppFloat.desc: Your message will open in WhatsApp to +{phone}
whatsAppFloat.messagePlaceholder: e.g. I would like to book a relaxing massage on Saturday…

login.title: Admin sign-in
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage bookings, services, and blocks.
login.errorTitle: We could not sign you in

adminLayout.needLogin: You need to sign in as an administrator to view this panel.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time operational overview of the spa.

revenueChart.title: Revenue by day (confirmed)
revenueChart.empty: No confirmed revenue in this range.
revenueChart.hint: Sum of confirmed booking prices by day (local timezone).

reserve.loadingPaymentSub: Creating your booking and opening Stripe securely…
reserve.title: Online booking
reserve.subtitle: Choose your service, date, and time. It takes less than 2 minutes ✨
reserve.errServicesLoad: We could not load treatments. Try refreshing the page.
reserve.errAvailabilityNet: We could not check availability. Check your connection or try another time.
reserve.errAvailabilityGeneric: Something went wrong checking availability. Try again.
reserve.errSubmitGeneric: We could not complete your booking. Check your details and try again.
reserve.selectedDetailAria: Full description of the selected service
reserve.variantSub: Choose the option you want for this booking.
reserve.sectionServiceSub: Select the treatment you want to book
reserve.noServices: No services are available right now.
reserve.sectionDatetimeSub: Pick an available day and time
reserve.slotBad: Time not available — choose another date or time.
reserve.addonsSub: Enhance your experience with available extras.
reserve.noAddons: No add-ons available at the moment.
reserve.dataSub: Name, phone, and email are required to confirm payment. Notes are optional.
reserve.requiredHint: required · Phone: exactly 10 digits (Mexico mobile or landline).
reserve.emailFmtErr: Use a valid email format (e.g. name@domain.com).
reserve.sumBaseHint: Base price. Peak-time pricing may apply once you pick date and time.
reserve.stripeNote: When you confirm, you will be redirected to Stripe to pay. You can then see the status on this page.
reserve.footerNote: * For the best experience, arrive 10 minutes early. To reschedule, let us know 24 hours in advance.

confirmacion.title: Booking confirmation
confirmacion.syncOk: We synced your payment with the booking.
confirmacion.syncErrGeneric: We could not sync the payment immediately; we will keep checking.
confirmacion.syncNetwork: We could not reach the server to sync. Refresh in a few seconds.
confirmacion.waDesc: Open a chat (or save the message) with this booking’s details on number
confirmacion.paidMsg: Your appointment is saved. We look forward to seeing you at Body Max Spa.
confirmacion.cancelMsgStripe: Payment was cancelled. You can try again below or create a new booking.
confirmacion.cancelMsgGeneric: Payment could not be completed. Try again or book another appointment.
confirmacion.pendingMsg: Your payment is pending. It may take a few seconds.
confirmacion.paymentConfirmed: Payment confirmed. We look forward to seeing you at Body Max Spa!
confirmacion.paymentCancelled: This booking was not completed. Contact us if you need help.
confirmacion.paymentPending: If you still need to pay, use the retry payment button below.

adminServices.loadCatalogError: Could not load the service catalog.
adminServices.priceRequired: Price is required and must be greater than 0.
adminServices.durationRequired: Duration in minutes is required. Use an integer of at least 1.
adminServices.uploadInvalid: Image upload returned an invalid response. Are you still signed in as admin?
adminServices.serverNotJson: The server returned non-JSON. Sign in again and try once more.
adminServices.serverEmpty: Empty server response. Sign in again and try once more.
adminServices.title: Services
adminServices.emptyList: No services yet. Create the first one using the form on the right.
adminServices.savingUpdateSub: Uploading image if needed and saving changes…
adminServices.savingCreateSub: Uploading image if needed and saving to the database…
adminServices.formHint: Fields marked with * are required. Image is optional.
adminServices.editingNote: You are editing service #{id}. If you do not pick a new image, the current one stays.
adminServices.imageFormats: Allowed: JPEG/JPG (.jpg, .jpeg), PNG, WEBP, GIF. Max size: 5MB.
adminServices.hintPrice: Price: greater than 0, digits and one decimal point (e.g. 450.50). Duration: whole minutes only.
adminServices.hintEnglish: Fill in if you want different copy on /en. If empty, the Spanish name and description are shown there too.
adminServices.variantSectionHint: Each row is a bookable option. The first row (lowest order) also sets the legacy list price and duration.
adminServices.formHintEditPricing: When editing, price and duration are managed only in the options below.

adminHome.title: Admin panel
adminHome.subtitle: Manage bookings, services, and availability in one place.
adminHome.linkBlockedDesc: Restrict dates and times from booking.
adminHome.linkTestimonialsDesc: Real reviews (Google, Instagram, Facebook) on the home page.

adminBlocked.title: Block dates and time slots
adminBlocked.createErr: Could not create the block. Check the dates.
adminBlocked.deleteConfirm: Delete this block? The time will become available for bookings again.
adminBlocked.emptyList: No blocked slots on this page. Add one above when needed.

adminBookings.cancelWithRefund: Booking cancelled. The slot is free and a Stripe refund was sent.
adminBookings.cancelWithReason: Booking cancelled. The slot is free. ({reason})
adminBookings.cancelSimple: Booking cancelled. The slot is free.
adminBookings.title: Bookings
adminBookings.titleCancelConfirmed: Cancel the appointment, free the slot, and refund in Stripe (if a PaymentIntent is stored).
adminBookings.titleCancelPending: Cancel the pending booking and free the slot.

adminAddons.priceInvalid: Enter a valid price greater than 0.
adminAddons.title: Add-ons
adminAddons.intro: Active add-ons appear on the public booking flow. Price is added to the appointment total.
adminAddons.emptyList: No add-ons yet. Create the first one using the form on the right.
adminAddons.formHint: * required · Price must be greater than 0.

adminTestimonials.quoteRequired: The Spanish testimonial text is required.
adminTestimonials.title: Testimonials
adminTestimonials.intro: Publish real feedback from Google, Instagram, or Facebook. Copy text faithfully and link to the review or post when possible. Use the optional English field if you want a /en version.
adminTestimonials.emptyList: No testimonials yet. Create the first one using the form on the right.
adminTestimonials.phQuote: Text as the client wrote it…
adminTestimonials.deleteConfirm: Remove this testimonial from the site?
adminTestimonials.activated: Testimonial is visible on the home page.
adminTestimonials.deactivated: Testimonial is hidden on the home page.
